script:
set +e
echo '=== mskai claude call with explicit RC ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text > /tmp/mskai_out 2>/tmp/mskai_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 200 /tmp/mskai_out; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 200 /tmp/mskai_err'
echo '=== check all per-user homes for symlinks pointing into azureuser ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily gabriel heather jesusr jose kaye lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  find /home/$u -maxdepth 3 -type l 2>/dev/null | while read l; do
    tgt=$(readlink "$l")
    if [[ "$tgt" == /home/azureuser* ]]; then echo "$l -> $tgt"; fi
  done
done | head -30
echo '=== per-user .credentials.json mode/owner after master restore ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json /home/alejandro/.claude/.credentials.json /home/rosi/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '===END==='
